title: aster laevis subsp. geyeri
intro: Aster laevis subsp. geyeri, also known as the smooth aster or Geyer's aster, is a perennial plant in the daisy family that is native to the western United States and southwestern Canada. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help soothe wounds and reduce fever. The health benefits of Aster laevis subsp. geyeri include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues.
